comment: Default-FAIL verification contract. Every check starts at passes=false. A check may be flipped to true only after its verification command ran and the evidence file (log, report, or screenshot path relative to the repository root) was inspected. check-contract.(sh|ps1) refuses Done while any required check fails. Checks with required:false that have passes=false must carry a non-empty waiver_reason explaining why the check does not apply.

checks.waiver_reason: Non-code stack (Markdown templates and skill definition only, per tasks.md Global Constraints) -- no lint/typecheck/build toolchain applies.
Non-code stack (Markdown templates and skill definition only, per tasks.md Global Constraints) -- no lint/typecheck/build toolchain applies.

No separate integration surface beyond what artifact-set.Tests.ps1 already covers as acceptance-tests: domain-interviewer is an internal (disable-model-invocation: true, user-invocable: false) skill with no execution path reachable except through the not-yet-public domain-model entry skill (T-004, out of scope for this task).
Non-code stack (Markdown templates and skill definition only, per tasks.md Global Constraints) -- no lint/typecheck/build toolchain applies.

domain-interviewer is an internal (disable-model-invocation: true, user-invocable: false) skill with no standalone entry point and no dev server/CLI binary to start; it is not wired into any invokable command surface until T-004, so there is nothing to smoke-run yet.
No prior behavior exists to diff against: domain-interviewer/SKILL.md, its seven templates, and both Pester suites are net-new files with no previous implementation or baseline output to compare.
No UI surface is introduced or touched by this task; domain-interviewer is a Markdown skill definition consumed by an LLM agent, not a rendered interface.
No UI/design-system surface is introduced or touched by this task; no design-system/ directory applies.
